item.title: 代理评估差距：企业人工智能组织存在现实一致性问题，而不是覆盖范围问题——而且大多数都已投入生产
item.summary: Across 157 enterprises, organizations are granting AI agents more autonomy while trusting the evaluations meant to gate that autonomy less. Half have already shipped an agent that passed their internal evaluations and then failed a customer in production; only one in twenty fully trusts automated evaluation today; and
